SEARCH
Package com.example.lottery.model

Class EntrantEvent

java.lang.Object
com.example.lottery.model.EntrantEvent
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class EntrantEvent extends Object implements Serializable
Model class representing an entrant's participation record in an event's waiting list.

Target Firestore path: events/{eventId}/waitingList/{userId}

See Also:

    Full constructor for an entrant-event relationship.
